ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the time interval */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the time interval */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades during the time interval */,
  "financial_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the financial instrument is traded */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval of the data (e.g., 1 minute, 5 minutes, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding market data entry */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval for which the technical indicator is calculated */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., junior trader, senior trader, analyst) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the trader joined the firm */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trader (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who created the strategy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the strategy (e.g., thresholds, limits) */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who last modified the strategy */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "backtest_results" TEXT /* Results of backtesting the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who executed the trade */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy used for the trade */,
  "financial_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade execution */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, canceled, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
